raw_consumer_statement: Problem began XX/XX/XXXX with an XXXX XXXX purchase that I canceled a few days later. By phone on XX/XX/XXXX I cancelled it. After charge / & cancellation they credited it back. However on XX/XX/XXXX XXXX XXXX store for some reason beyond my control and after I got a new card number charged my card again twice. This was the stores mistake and the amount was credited back to Barclay. This all happened in XX/XX/XXXX. Please help.Thank you being as honest as I can. previous card number which was the original was XXXX Barclay credit card in my name XXXX XXXX XXXX thank you,
